description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow with read-only repository permissions that runs daily at 3:23 AM UTC. The workflow should have two jobs: one for clang-tidy on ubuntu-22.04 that checks out the code, sets up a build agent for clang-tidy, installs Boost, configures the build with specific options, and runs clang-tidy. The other job for valgrind also on ubuntu-22.04 that checks out the code, sets up a build agent for valgrind-full, and performs valgrind checks.
